---
title: "Weekly Progress Summary"
subtitle: "{{WEEK_START}} – {{WEEK_END}}"
date: "{{REPORT_DATE}}"
format:
  html:
    toc: true
    toc-depth: 2
    number-sections: false
    html-math-method: katex
---

::: {.callout-tip collapse="true"}
## How to use this template
Replace every `{{TOKEN}}` placeholder and every italicised guidance line.
Keep bullets ≤ 15 words, one idea per bullet (see [.claude/docs.md](../.claude/docs.md) §Writing Style).
Slide-deck companion: [weekly_presentation.qmd](weekly_presentation.qmd).
:::

## TL;DR

*One line per finding. Each bullet links to its section below. 3–5 bullets total.*

- **Finding 1** — headline result in one clause → [§1](#sec-finding-1)
- **Finding 2** — headline result in one clause → [§2](#sec-finding-2)
- **Finding 3** — headline result in one clause → [§3](#sec-finding-3)

## 1. {{FINDING_1_TITLE}} {#sec-finding-1}

*Objective: one sentence stating what this finding answers.*

*Setup: dataset, model, budget, evaluation metric — one line.*

| {{COL_METHOD}} | {{COL_METRIC}} (↑) | Δ vs {{BASELINE}} |
|---|:---:|:---:|
| **{{OUR_METHOD}}** | **{{VALUE}}** | **{{DELTA}}** |
| {{BASELINE_A}} | {{VALUE}} | {{DELTA}} |
| {{BASELINE_B}} | {{VALUE}} | {{DELTA}} |

*Takeaway: one sentence — what the table proves, disproves, or narrows.*

Backing experiment: [{{EXPERIMENT_PAGE_TITLE}}](experiments/{{EXPERIMENT_PAGE}}.qmd).

## 2. {{FINDING_2_TITLE}} {#sec-finding-2}

*Objective: one sentence.*

*Design: variables held fixed, variable being swept, control condition.*

| Condition | {{METRIC_A}} | {{METRIC_B}} |
|:---:|:---:|:---:|
| {{COND_BASELINE}} | {{VALUE}} | {{VALUE}} |
| {{COND_TREATMENT}} | {{VALUE}} | {{VALUE}} |
| {{COND_CONTROL}} | {{VALUE}} | {{VALUE}} |

*Takeaway: one sentence.*

Details: [{{EXPERIMENT_PAGE_TITLE}}](experiments/{{EXPERIMENT_PAGE}}.qmd).

## 3. {{FINDING_3_TITLE}} {#sec-finding-3}

*Objective: one sentence.*

*Result narrative: 1–3 short bullets — what changed across conditions, in numbers.*

- {{CONDITION_A}}: {{METRIC}} moved from {{X}} → {{Y}}
- {{CONDITION_B}}: {{METRIC}} stayed flat at {{Z}}
- Control: {{METRIC}} collapsed to {{W}}

*Takeaway: one sentence — the mechanism this exposes.*

Details: [{{EXPERIMENT_PAGE_TITLE}}](experiments/{{EXPERIMENT_PAGE}}.qmd).

## 4. Synthesis

*Recommended pattern: Finding A + Finding B ⇒ narrowed claim C. Two short paragraphs max.*

- **Claim**: one sentence stating the joined conclusion.
  - Evidence A: short pointer to §{{N}} with the key number.
  - Evidence B: short pointer to §{{N}} with the key number.
- **Caveat / scope**: the regime in which the claim holds (e.g. dataset scale, model family).

## 5. Next Steps

| Priority | Task | Purpose |
|:---:|---|---|
| 1 | **{{TASK_1}}** | {{ONE_LINE_PURPOSE}} |
| 2 | **{{TASK_2}}** | {{ONE_LINE_PURPOSE}} |
| 3 | **{{TASK_3}}** | *Headroom* — {{WHY_NOT_BLOCKER}} |

```{=html}
<hr style="margin-top:3rem;">
<div style="display:flex; justify-content:space-between; margin-top:1rem;">
  <a href="weekly_presentation.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">View slide deck →</a>
  <a href="experiments/overview.qmd" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm">← Experiments Dashboard</a>
</div>
```
